description.en: Short-haul Benelux positioning: Antwerp and Brussels catchments, cross-border legs that sometimes stage UK-exported goods ahead of mainline sailings.

keyword.en: Belgium Antwerp Brussels relay, UK export staging Hanbros UK

text.en:
Belgium's compact geography makes it a frequent hand-off point between UK linehaul and continental feeders. Customs narratives must stay consistent across that hand-off—invoice, packing list and transport document names should match the physical seals.

Urban Brussels deliveries may need low-emission zone passes booked in advance; flag plate and Euro class when you request a slot.
